name: Vanitas •°• Bluebeard
description:
A mysterious lord in 1894 loses one spouse after another to a mysterious illness, and now you are next in line: A partner who will bring great wealth to his family. However, Vanitas is not the charming and loving man you thought he was when you found a cellar full of corpses...
─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐲, 𝐦𝐲 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞.
─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

This bot was a commission for GlazedGlonut from Discord. It is a retelling of the dark bluebeard fairytale!

**TRIGGER WARNINGS:** This bot is not meant for romantic interactions. It is intended as a horror scenario in which the user must escape or find a way to defeat him. It has disturbing content such as:

**Horror, Violence, Death, NonCon, Blood, Rude Behavior, Manipulation, Murder, Corpses, Toxic relationship, Antisocial Personality Disorder, psychopathy**

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!!

The Intro has the following triggers: Violence, Corpses, Blood!!

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

**Fairytale series**

𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝘁𝘀 𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀:
[Prince Naveen - Frog Prince](https://janitorai.com/characters/273ec064-3b1b-47f3-9b1f-cd4e8277edcc_character-naveen-frog-prince)
[The King of Spades - Wonderland](https://janitorai.com/characters/7e13ebd2-3f3d-49c7-8938-ceb6011eeb59_character-feryian-wonderland)
[The King of Hearts - Wonderland](https://janitorai.com/characters/223d537b-87e7-4448-9022-4d35c7da5cb3_character-orion-wonderland)
[The King of Hearts right hand](https://janitorai.com/characters/f103a49b-9854-416c-9e4c-23149842eb87_character-delian-wonderland)
[Plutao - last unicorn](https://janitorai.com/characters/4f719c63-b31d-471c-bac1-5d49447adc48_character-plutao-last-unicorn)
[Helia - Rapunzel with blind user](https://janitorai.com/characters/029ef2bd-a397-4d8f-b2b6-bc65ca02c6a4_character-helia-rapunzel)
[Ace - Red Riding Hood but dark romance](https://janitorai.com/characters/288599ab-869f-421e-be65-e052a68df24e_character-ace-red-riding-hood)
[Vixian - Little Mermaid](https://janitorai.com/characters/8cb7b5de-ed61-4804-bc1f-3cf1181d5aaa_character-vixian-little-mermaid)
[Aspen - Beauty and the Beast](https://janitorai.com/characters/63459786-f0bc-471d-a081-c19dea467dbf_character-aspen-beauty-and-the-beast)

![png](https://i.ibb.co/89RZczp/652598be-8ecd-4845-bc70-976f2e8e2863.png)
─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

**𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:**
Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.

Works best with: GPT 4-1106 Preview (at least 6000 tokens context size), Claude 2.0/2.1 on Sillytavern.

use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k. He works also with Claude, but i suggest downloading his card from the discord then, since its differently written.
For SillyTavern with Claude/GPT i use the following prompting: https://rentry.org/pancatstack#instructions
Thanks to the creator! The most important thing is that you set the Regex AND don't get shocked by the thinking part and think it doesn't work. If you set the Regex, it works.
There is also a new one now: https://rentry.org/pancatbeta

CONTEXT SIZE: set to at least 6000.
MODEL: GPT 3.5 16k, GPT 4-1106 Preview(2023). Idk if JanitorLLM works too.
MAX NEW TOKENS: I always have it set to 300-500 tokens.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

**𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀:**
